From: Analytics engineer
To: BI

We locked the churn contract last week (below). The build starts Monday - what tests
should we add so we know the build matches what we pinned?

--- knowledge-base/kpi-contract.md (excerpt) ---
# KPI Contract - Monthly Logo Churn v1.1 (LOCKED 2026-06-04, owner: RevOps)
- Grain: one row per (customer_id, month).
- Population: paying customers only; status NOT IN (trial, internal, test).
- Churn event: subscription_end_date in month AND no reactivation within 30 days.
- Date basis: UTC, calendar month by subscription_end_date.
- Late data: cancellations can arrive up to 48h late; month closes T+2.
- Null policy: customer_id never null; a null end_date means active (not churned).
- Source of record: billing system; monthly reconciliation to CRM within 0.5% relative.
- Re-audit when: billing schema changes or the reactivation window is renegotiated.
